content: CSS gift box split animation: Use two halves (left/right or top/bottom) with transform: translateX/Y and rotate. Framer Motion drives the animation with spring physics. Particles burst from gap using absolute-positioned small elements with random trajectories (CSS or canvas). The existing GiftBox.jsx has a lid-lift variant; phase 3 needs to add split-from-center body halves. Sender name displayed on box body via CSS text overlay. Glow effect via radial-gradient pseudo-element with theme colors.
